rationale: Educ. Code §48.303 governs state aid for regional education service center staff salaries. It has no dependency on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 48.303. ADDITIONAL STATE AID FOR REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE CENTER STAFF SALARY INCREASES.
_note: No textual or operational link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
